headline: Conquistadors: Preseason Front Office Brief
executive_summary: Conquistadors carries a championship-lineup C-AVI average of 90.46, led by Josh Allen, Puka Nacua, and Bijan Robinson. The immediate preseason decision is not broad roster turnover; it is whether the FLEX slot currently occupied by Juwan Johnson (63.5 C-AVI) can be improved without weakening the verified core.

sections.title: Competitive Core
sections.body: The three highest C-AVI starters are Josh Allen (99.6), Puka Nacua (99.6), and Bijan Robinson (99.4). That concentration gives Conquistadors a defined top-end identity.

sections.title: Lineup Pressure Point
sections.body: Among the eight verified championship-lineup slots, Juwan Johnson is the lowest C-AVI starter at 63.5. Any preseason acquisition should be measured against that exact lineup threshold, not against the bottom of the bench.

sections.title: Depth and Flexibility
sections.body: The team file contains 11 offensive players, leaving 3 offensive players outside the modeled starting eight. The offensive roster D-AVI average is 81.05, which should be used to judge whether consolidation improves the lineup more than it reduces flexibility.

sections.title: Availability
sections.body: All 11 offensive players in the current team file are marked Active. There is no knowledge-backed reason for an emergency replacement move this week.

sections.title: Draft Assets
sections.body: No franchise-labelled draft asset was found in the approved knowledge files. The summary does not infer ownership from roster position or prior conversations.
